title: Ability to Reduce Text Size & Match Outlook Formatting in Emails
excerpt:

posts.author: mmartucci (Marco Martucci)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi Monday Team,

I’d like to request an enhancement to the email formatting options within Monday.com.

Right now, the available text formatting appears much larger and more spaced-out than standard email clients — especially Outlook. Because of this, emails sent from Monday often look visually inconsistent with the messages we typically send from Outlook, which can make automated or board-triggered emails appear less polished or “off-brand.”

Feature Request:

Add the ability to adjust text size (smaller font options)

Add a formatting preset or theme that matches standard Outlook email formatting

Ensure spacing, font weight, and layout feel consistent with typical Outlook messages

What are you trying to achieve

This would help teams maintain a consistent communication style and ensure emails sent from Monday align with the look and feel of our existing client communications.

Thanks for considering! I’m sure many users who rely on automations or email integrations would benefit from this level of control.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mmartucci If you want a workaround until developed by Monday, and open to marketplace apps, you can try Supermail.

It allows send rich text designed automated emails directly from monday.
